text: Energy Pedals One provides an introduction for the robotic energy devices, as well as providing an orientation for the foot pedals and their controls. The right hand will have control of scissors, which have the capabilities of doing monopolar cut and coagulation. And you'll see that the screen provides instruction as to which energy modality to apply and when to apply it.
The robotic system's left arm is equipped with a grasper used for bipolar cautery. The surgeon uses the grasper to hold the center of a barbell-shaped object and applies bipolar coagulation.
The interface on the screen provides feedback on foot position relative to the pedals, highlighting changes from the left arm to the right arm as the right foot hovers over the right arm foot pedals.

And though the objects appear at random and there's no set sequence, a quick tip is that the small spheres will always be for monopolar cut, the larger spheres will always be for monopolar coag, and the barbell-like objects will always be for bipolar coag.
